## Checklist

- [ ] Scoped to one feature/fix (no unrelated changes)
- [ ] Backend tests pass locally (`python manage.py test`), if backend was touched
- [ ] Manually verified in the running app, if frontend or ml_service was touched
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, or generated files (`db.sqlite3`, `node_modules/`, `venv/`) included in the diff
